patch.value: pm-todos + pm-beads: migrate to registerImporter/registerExporter (importers capability exemplar)
pm-todos/pm-beads implement import/export via registerCommand, so the importers capability has no first-party exemplar and external authors have no model.
Both migrate to api.registerImporter/registerExporter retaining backward-compatible command paths; manifests gain importers capability; tests+SDK.md importer example updated.
pm-todos/pm-beads implement import/export via registerCommand, so the importers capability has no first-party exemplar and external authors have no model.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Unblocked + ready: pm-kfd8 (closed this PR) shipped assertRegisteredImporter/assertRegisteredExporter in src/sdk/testing.ts (match on registrations.importers[].importer / registrations.exporters[].exporter). When pm-todos/pm-beads migrate to api.registerImporter/registerExporter, their package specs should assert via these helpers for non-synthetic first-party importer/exporter exemplars. Finding: no first-party package registers an importer/exporter today, so this item is the real importers-capability exemplar.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Plan (depends on pm-7qjk, now landed): migrate pm-todos (import+export) and pm-beads (import) from registerCommand to registerImporter/registerExporter using the new ImportExportRegistrationOptions 3rd arg, preserving command paths (todos import/export, beads import), actions (todos-import/todos-export/beads-import), descriptions and all flags (--folder/--author/--message, --file/--preserve-source-ids). Manifests gain 'importers' capability in 3 places each: manifest.json, the in-module `manifest` const (index.ts), and the hand-maintained index.js mirror. Tests: builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts createCommandOnlyApi stub captures importers/exporters (was throwing); manifest-equality + todos/beads blocks updated to assert importer/exporter registration + options metadata + invoke the importer/exporter fn (runtime stub via PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT unchanged). Plus a real-loader activation test asserting via assertRegisteredImporter/assertRegisteredExporter for a non-synthetic first-party exemplar (acceptance). registerImporter('todos')→'todos import' path is exact (toRegistrationCommandPath), so backward compatible. runtime.ts/js unchanged (beads runtime.js stays coverage-gated+green).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implemented + verified. pm-todos (registerImporter 'todos' + registerExporter 'todos') and pm-beads (registerImporter 'beads') migrated using pm-7qjk's ImportExportRegistrationOptions; index.ts + hand-maintained index.js + manifest.json + in-module manifest const all gained 'importers' capability. Command paths/actions/descriptions/flags all preserved (registerImporter('todos')->'todos import' is exact). Tests: builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts createCommandOnlyApi now captures importers/exporters; manifest-equality + todos/beads blocks assert importer/exporter registration + options metadata + invoke the fn; NEW real-loader test asserts via assertRegisteredImporter/assertRegisteredExporter against the real package activate (non-synthetic). decideWriteGate still classifies 'beads import'/'todos import' as mutations (paths unchanged). Manual temp-dir e2e: `todos import --help` shows description + --folder/--author/--message; `beads import --help` shows description + --file/--preserve-source-ids; `todos import --folder` imported 1, `todos export --folder` exported 1 file, `beads import --file --preserve-source-ids` imported 1 (source id preserved); package doctor ok 0 warnings; health ok. 362 affected unit+integration tests green.

patch.value: Shipped: pm-todos (registerImporter 'todos' + registerExporter 'todos') and pm-beads (registerImporter 'beads') migrated to the importers capability using pm-7qjk's options, preserving every command path/action/description/flag. Manifests + in-module manifest consts + hand-maintained index.js mirrors gained 'importers'. builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts updated (importer/exporter capture + real-loader assertRegisteredImporter/assertRegisteredExporter exemplar test). Manual temp-dir e2e verified import/export functionality and help (description+flags) survival; doctor + health clean.
